revision.comment: Text replacement - "== AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA ==" to "== AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]]"
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->
{{Infobox religious building |name=Ashizumi Shrine |image=File:Ashizumijinja.JPG | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|location={{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|qid=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|Takashima, Shiga|en|Takashima, Shiga|qid=Q845794|lt=Takashima, Shiga|1=Takashima, Shiga}} Adogawa-chō Kawashima 615-1 |位置={{coord|35|19|46.2|N|136|03|04.0|E|type:landmark_region:JP-25|display=inline,title|qq=}} |deity={{ill|Shima Tsuhiko no Mikoto|ja|島津彦命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shima Tsuhiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |type={{ill|Candidate Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|qq=draft論社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Candidate Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}, Former {{ill|Sonsha (village shrine)|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonsha (village shrine)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}} |創建=Unknown |本殿=[[Flowing style shrine|三間社流造]] |別名= |札所等= |festival={{ill|May 1|en|May 1|qid=Q2544|lt=May 1|1=May 1}} |神事= |地図={{location map|Japan Shiga Prefecture|label=阿志都彌神社|float=center|relief=1|width=256|qq=}} |prefecture={{ill|Takashima|qid=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}} |coordinates={{Coord|35.3295|N|136.051111|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |architecture_style={{ill|nagare-zukuri|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} }} '''Ashizumi Jinja''' (阿志都彌神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|qid=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in the Adogawa-chō area of {{ill|Takashima, Shiga|en|Takashima, Shiga|qid=Q845794|lt=Takashima, Shiga|1=Takashima, Shiga}}, {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|qid=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is recognized as a candidate (論社) for one of the ancient {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}. == deity == * {{ill|Shima Tsuhiko no Mikoto|ja|島津彦命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shima Tsuhiko no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} == History == The shrine’s founding date is unknown. According to its records, in Meō 2 (1493), the shrine grounds were improved by Sasaki Noto-no-Kami, the lord of {{ill|Funaki Castle|ja|船木城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Funaki Castle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Later, in Kanbun 2 (1662), both the main sanctuary and worship hall were rebuilt. In Meiji 9 (1876), it was classified as a {{ill|Sonsha (village shrine)|ja|村社|1=Son-sha|qid=Q134917284}}{{efn|Former shrine rank|lt=Son-sha|1=modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sonsha (village shrine)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 近代社格制度|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q712534}}. == Festivals == * ''Festival'': May 1 == Subsidiary Shrines == * {{ill|Ōta Jinja|ja|太田神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōta Jinja|1=Ōta Jinja|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16766606}} * {{ill|Hachiman Jinja|ja|八幡神社|lt=Hachiman Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hachiman Jinja|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 八幡宮|1=Hachiman shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11390939}} * {{ill|Inari shrine|en|Inari shrine|qid=Q514480|lt=Inari Shrine|1=Inari shrine}} == External Links == * [http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1399 Ashizumi Jinja] (Shiga Prefectural Association of Shinto Shrines) {{translated page|ja|阿志都彌神社|version=88581235|comment=Imported full ja history}}
<!--Ashizumi Jinja--><!--Ashizumi Jinja-->
<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
== AUTOGENERATED CONTENT FROM WIKIDATA == [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]]
'''Ashizumi Shrine (Q11657433)''' is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]].
== Shikinaisha (式内社) == {| class="wikitable sortable" ! District !! Name !! Funding category !! Rank !! Notes !! Same as !! Co-ords !! Shrine DB |- | RONSHA || {{ill|Ashizumi Shrine|lt=Ashizumi Shrine|ja|阿志都彌神社|qid=Q11657433|1=Ashizumi Shrine}} || {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|lt=Kokuhei|comment=categorized|1=Kokuhei-sha}} || — || — || {{ill|Ashitsumino Shrine|lt=Ashitsumino Shrine|qid=Q135039871|1=Ashitsumino Shrine}}; {{ill|Ashitsumino Shrine|lt=Ashitsumino Shrine|qid=Q135039871|1=Ashitsumino Shrine}} || {{coord|35.329380|136.051029|display=inline}} || [https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=181893 DB] |} {{wikidata link|Q11657433}} [[da:d:Q11657433]] [[ja:阿志都彌神社]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Pages with duplicated content]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]]==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧村社]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Takashima, Shiga]]
